message:
feat(vdbe): thread schema through emit helpers for cross-table expression resolution

Pass the full schema slice through emit_column_reads, emit_where_filter,
codegen_select_aggregate, and codegen_select_group_by_aggregate so that
expression evaluation has access to all table definitions, not just the
current scan target. Also fixes CTE row insertion to use explicit rowid
and get_table_mut() instead of the generic insert_row path.

Key changes:
- Add schema parameter to emit_column_reads, emit_where_filter,
  codegen_select_aggregate, codegen_select_group_by_aggregate
- Wire schema through all call sites (codegen_select, codegen_insert_select,
  codegen_update, codegen_delete)
- ScanContext.schema changes from None to Some(schema) for column reads
- CTE temporary table insertion now uses table.insert_row(rowid, vals)
  with explicit sequential rowids

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
